parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "kind": "alert",
  "service": $json.name,
  "classification": $json.classification,
  "severity": $json.severity,
  "summary": $json.name + ' (' + $json.public_url + ')\nהחזיר ' + $json.code + ' ב-' + $json.ms + 'ms' + ($json.error ? '\n' + $json.error : ''),
  "suggested_fix": $json.classification === 'unreachable' ? 'בדוק ב-Railway dashboard.' : 'בדוק לוגים ב-Railway.',
  "incident_id": $json.name + '_' + $json.classification + '_' + Date.now()
}
